description_long: This object is a triangular, tent-shaped envelope made from a single sheet of stiff, white paper or cardstock, folded to form a three-dimensional structure. One side prominently displays a printed calendar for January 2022, with days of the week and dates in black and red, and the month 'Janeiro' and year '2022' at the top. The other visible surfaces are plain, with no markings or text, and the interior is hollow, allowing light to pass through the open base. The surface has a slight sheen, suggesting a semi-glossy finish, and the edges are sharply creased, indicating precise folding. The envelope is free-standing and could be used as a desk calendar or display piece in an office or urban environment. No visible openings, flaps, or address markings are present, and the object appears to be purely decorative or informational.
description: A triangular, tent-shaped envelope made of white cardstock, featuring a printed January 2022 calendar on one face and plain surfaces elsewhere. The object is hollow, free-standing, and has a semi-glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular profile, open base, and partial calendar print on the left face.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full printed January 2022 calendar with clear text and numbers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the triangular profile and open base visible, but less of the calendar print.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unmarked white surface with no text or features.
